title: Mana&Machine
description: A modpack that brings together the world of magic with the power of machines
body:
Mana&Machine – The Symphony Between Mana and Machine

Mana&Machine is a unique Minecraft experience that merges two traditionally opposite worlds: ancient magic and advanced technology. In this modpack, you don’t have to choose between casting spells or building factories — here, you can do both.

Explore a rich and vibrant universe where ancient runes and energy circuits coexist. Learn to master complex magical schools with Ars Nouveau, and harness the natural power of Botania. Each magic mod has been carefully selected to offer depth and variety, allowing you to personalize your arcane journey.

At the same time, technology is thriving. Build industrial systems with Create, optimize energy networks with Thermal Series, Mekanism, and PipeZ, or create digital storage and automation systems with Applied Energistics 2. Machines, robots, reactors, and conveyor belts coexist with grimoires, wands, and magical crystals.

But MagiCore goes beyond simply adding mods: it offers smart integrations, fine-tuned balancing, and a progression curve that encourages combining both paths. Perhaps you'll use mana to power your machines — or turn technology into a catalyst for forbidden rituals.

The modpack has also been carefully optimized to deliver strong performance, even with dozens of mods. It includes performance tools like FerriteCore to ensure smooth gameplay.
